reversed_payroll_uuid.description: The UUID for the payroll run being reversed.

reversal_payroll_uuid.description: The UUID of the payroll where the reversal was applied.

reason.description: A reason provided by the admin who created the reversal.

approved_at.description: Timestamp of when the reversal was approved.

category.description: Category chosen by the admin who requested the reversal.
